section.heading: Recordkeeping violations
section.chapeau: It shall be unlawful for any person willfully to fail or refuse—

paragraph.content: to establish or maintain any record required by any regulation prescribed under this chapter;
to submit any report, notice, or other information to the United States Government in accordance with any regulation prescribed under this chapter; or
to permit access to or copying of any record by the United States Government in accordance with any regulation prescribed under this chapter.
